title: New Game!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
I jumped so high—*splat!*—my socks flew!
Watch ‘em spin like a kite so new!
You yelled so loud the dog went *zoom*!
We won the fight—no gloom, no doom!

[chorus]
New game! New game!
Spin the couch, shout my name!
New game! Let’s play!
Hit reset—hooray!

[verse 2]
I slipped right on your big left shoe!
You laughed so hard—*snort!*—it’s true!
The screen went *flash!* the crowd went *wow!*
We beat the boss—yeah, take a bow!

[chorus]
New game! New game!
Spin the couch, shout my name!
New game! Let’s play!
Hit reset—hooray!

[ending]
Now we’re beat, but we don’t care,
We’ll play again—just wait and stare!
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, acoustic guitar, bass, and snare, 119 BPM, firm punchy groove, satisfying stomp, strong rhythm, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: The late afternoon sun slants through the living room window, casting golden stripes across the worn blue carpet as you leap up from your knees, controllers still clutched in both hands—your best friend’s face mirrors yours, eyes wide, mouth open in a grin, as the final "KO!" flashes on the TV screen. "NEW GAME!" you both scream at once, already shoving each other toward the couch, socks sliding on the hardwood as you jostle for the best seat.
cover_description: Two kids leap off the couch, controllers flying, as the TV flashes "KO!" in bright letters.
